summary: P0 RateHawk Booking Flow — ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All booking flow UI components verified (Precheck, Test Matrix, Booking History, Architecture Info Cards).
critical_code_review_comments: ratehawk_booking_service.py: Well-implemented ETG API v3-compliant booking flow with proper async status polling, cut-off timeout handling (60s), and test property support
partner_order_id = syroce_booking_uuid consistently used across the entire booking lifecycle
Test Matrix correctly verifies all 5 scenarios: success, precheck_validation, do_not_book, book_and_cancel, status_check
Booking status history tracking properly implemented with status_history array containing status/at/detail entries
InventorySyncDashboardPage.jsx: Complete booking flow UI with all required data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all booking flow panels, buttons, sections working)

seed_data_creation: None required - simulation mode generates test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 RateHawk Booking Flow complete. All 7 booking endpoints working correctly. Test Matrix passes 5/5 scenarios. Simulation mode active (no real RateHawk API calls).

POST /api/inventory/booking/precheck.details: Returns decision (proceed/proceed_with_warning/requires_approval/abort), pricing (cached_price, revalidated_price, drift_pct, drift_amount, currency), book_hash, can_proceed, requires_approval

POST /api/inventory/booking/create.details: Creates booking with partner_order_id=booking_id, handles test_hotel_do_not_book as rejection, returns booking_id, status (confirmed/failed), confirmation_code

GET /api/inventory/booking/{booking_id}/.details: Returns booking status with status_history array (status, at, detail entries), partner_order_id matches booking_id

POST /api/inventory/booking/{booking_id}.details: Cancels confirmed or awaiting_confirmation bookings, returns cancelled status

POST /api/inventory/booking/test-matrix.details: Runs 5 scenarios (success, precheck_validation, do_not_book, book_and_cancel, status_check), returns summary (passed/failed/total), overall_status

GET /api/inventory/booking/history.details: Returns bookings array with booking_id, partner_order_id, hotel_id, status, confirmation_code, mode, created_at

GET /api/inventory/booking/test-matrix/h.details: Returns test matrix run history with matrix_id, scenarios, overall_status, timestamp

Frontend: RateHawk Booking Flow Panel.details: Panel renders correctly with title 'RateHawk Booking Flow', ETG API v3 description, Gecmis button

Frontend: Precheck Section.details: Displays Decision badge (proceed), Cached Price, Revalidated Price, Price Drift, book_hash, mode, latency

Frontend: Test Matrix Section.details: Shows 'Tum Senaryolari Calistir' button, displays 5/5 PASS badge, scenario table with all 5 scenarios

Frontend: Architecture Info Cards.details: 3 cards: partner_order_id info, Async Booking info (15 attempts, 60s timeout), Test Properties (test_hotel, test_hotel_do_not_book)

Frontend: Booking History Section.details: Displays booking history table with columns: Booking ID, partner_order_id, Hotel, Durum, Confirmation, Mod, Tarih

Auth Required.details: All booking endpoints properly return 401/403 without authentication

mocked_apis_list: RateHawk ETG API v3 — SIMULATION mode active (no real API calls)
mocked_apis.note: Backend runs in simulation mode. Booking confirmations and rejections are simulated. test_hotel_do_not_book correctly triggers rejection.

p0_booking_flow_verified.precheck_decision_matrix: Verified: drift <2% → proceed, 2-5% → proceed_with_warning, 5-10% → requires_approval, >10% → abort
p0_booking_flow_verified.partner_order_id_consistency: Verified: booking_id === partner_order_id across all operations
p0_booking_flow_verified.status_history_tracking: Verified: status_history array contains timestamped entries with status/at/detail

test_matrix_scenarios.success: PASS - Normal booking confirms with confirmation_code
test_matrix_scenarios.book_and_cancel: PASS - Book then cancel flow working
test_matrix_scenarios.status_check: PASS - Status retrieval with history working
